common.autoCredentials: Ana samar da sunayen masu amfani da kalmomin sirri na wucin gadi ta atomatik ga kowane ma'aikaci
common.generateCredentialsDesc: Ƙirƙira sunan mai amfani da kalmar sirri ta wucin gadi ta atomatik ga kowane ma'aikacin da aka shigo. Masu amfani da SSO za su iya tsallake wannan.
common.importingDesc: Ana ƙirƙirar bayanan ma'aikata da samar da bayanan shiga. Wannan na iya ɗaukar lokaci don shigo mai yawa.
common.importCompleteDesc: An shigo da ma'aikata {count} cikin nasara a cikin tsarin.
common.downloadCredentialsDesc: Sauke fayil ɗin CSV da ke ɗauke da sunayen masu amfani da kalmomin sirri na wucin gadi. Raba shi cikin aminci.

auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your Tempo account
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Try a demo credential below.
auth.demoPwdNote: All demo accounts use password: demo1234
auth.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
auth.mfaEnterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.mfaEnterBackupCode: Enter one of your backup codes.

security.mfaDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account with TOTP-based two-factor authentication.
security.mfaEnabledDesc: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
security.backupCodesDesc: Use backup codes if you lose access to your authenticator app.
security.enrollFailed: Failed to start MFA setup. Please try again.
security.setupInstructions: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, or similar), or enter the secret key manually.
security.otpAuthUriHint: Copy this URI into your authenticator app if it supports URI import.
security.saveBackupCodesWarning: Save these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once. If you lose your authenticator, these are the only way to access your account.
security.verifyInstructions: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to verify setup.
security.mfaActivatedDesc: Your account is now protected. You will need to enter a code from your authenticator app each time you sign in.
security.disableMFAWarning: Disabling 2FA will make your account less secure. You will no longer need a verification code to sign in.
security.disableFailed: Failed to disable MFA. Please check your password.
security.regenWarning: Regenerating backup codes will invalidate all existing codes. Make sure to save the new ones.
security.regenFailed: Failed to regenerate backup codes. Please check your password.
security.newBackupCodes: Here are your new backup codes. Save them in a safe place.
